overview: UdyamSathi is a rural entrepreneurship platform on the Internet Computer that helps farmers, youth, and women entrepreneurs in India start and run small businesses in agriculture, fishery, poultry, and goat farming. It connects users with expert guidance, training programs, and resource supply — tracking every case from submission through expert assignment to completion.
features: Full backend with real data persistence — cases, profiles, trainings, resources, AI results, premium requests, and contact leads all stored in canister state
Internet Identity login with protected routes and admin panel
Service request system with auto-generated Case IDs and status tracking (Pending / In Progress / Completed)
Training enrollment with dashboard visibility and enrollment confirmation
AI business suggestion quiz with persistent result saved to user profile
Resource catalog with supply request system
Form-based premium support upgrade with admin contact workflow
Admin panel showing all submissions — cases, enrollments, contacts, supply requests, premium requests
About page with real UdyamSathi team: Prince Kumar, Rahul Kumar, Gautam Kumar Yadav, Mayank Kumar, Suhani Kumari
